vibe: Modern Bharat startup ecosystem, warm, ambitious, grassroots entrepreneurship, collaborative. Feels like 'People across India building meaningful things together.'

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-foreground leading-tight
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-foreground

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12). Allow content to breathe, reducing cognitive load.
spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8
spacing_and_layout.grid_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

surfaces.cards: bg-card border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 rounded-2xl
surfaces.glass_header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 border-b border-border z-50 sticky top-0
surfaces.glass_mobile_nav: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-background/90 border-t border-border z-50 fixed bottom-0 w-full
surfaces.chips_and_tags: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
surfaces.primary_button: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary_hover shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(232,93,4,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(232,93,4,0.23)] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-200

elements: Top row: Sector chip (e.g., AgriTech) + Trending Icon/Save Count
Meta flex wrap: Execution Type badge (Physical/Hybrid/Digital), Investment Range, Team Size
Footer: Beginner Friendly badge + Hover arrow icon

FilterBar.mobile: Sticky top-[header-height] bg-background/90 backdrop-blur-md z-40 p-4 border-b border-border overflow-x-auto whitespace-nowrap scrollbar-hide flex gap-2
FilterBar.desktop: Sidebar or top horizontal bar with dropdowns (Sector, Execution, Investment)

EmptyState.layout: Flex column center, generous padding (py-24), max-w-md mx-auto text-center
elements: H3 Title (e.g., 'No ideas found matching your filters')

landing_page.hero: Wide layout, minimal text. H1 'Build the Future of Bharat Together'. Idea Library CTA prominent. Hero image of collaborative workspace.
landing_page.value_prop: Bento grid showcasing collaboration, community, and opportunity.

idea_library_directory.layout: Header with title and description. Sticky filter bar. CSS Grid for IdeaCards (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6). Pagination or infinite scroll.

idea_detail.layout: Two-column desktop (main content left, sticky summary card right). Single column mobile.
sections: Header: Title, tags, tags, quick stats
Main: Problem, Target Customers, Roles Needed, Suitable Districts, Govt Schemes
Sticky Card: Investment Tier, Revenue Range, 'Join ValueWeave to Build This' CTA (triggers Google Auth if anonymous)

dashboard_home.layout: Grid-based. Prominent 'Browse Ideas' card acting as an entry point, Saved Ideas widget, Team status.

logos.description: ValueWeave minimalist warm orange abstract weave logo

hero_images.description: Collaborative workspace in India, warm golden hour lighting, optimistic

backgrounds.description: Abstract warm terracotta and cream gradient texture with subtle grain

illustrations.description: Abstract 3D interconnected blocks and plants for empty states

photography.description: Modern workspace setting in Gurugram, India

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure standard routing sets the Idea Library to exactly `/ideas` and Idea Detail to `/ideas/:slug`.
Construct the Navigation Bar (Desktop) with: Logo, 'Ideas' (active state indication), 'Opportunities', 'Dashboard', and 'Sign In'.
Construct a Mobile Bottom Navigation bar visible only on md< viewports: 'Home', 'Ideas', 'Dashboard', 'Profile'. It must have backdrop-blur and border-t.
Unauthenticated users MUST be able to freely browse `/ideas` and view `/ideas/:slug`. The 'Join ValueWeave to Build This' CTA on the detail page acts as the auth gate.

Style the Idea Cards elegantly. Do not overload them with borders; rely on shadow-sm, card background, and layout padding. Ensure tags like 'Execution Type' and 'Sector' pop with warm background chips.
Implement a polished Empty State using the provided 'empty_state' illustration URL when filters return 0 results.
Do NOT use raw HTML `<select>` for filters. Use Shadcn DropdownMenu or Select for desktop, and a scrolling chip list or bottom sheet for mobile filters.
Emphasize mobile responsiveness. Ensure the Idea Cards flex naturally to full width on mobile, and sticky filters don't obscure content.
